headline: Interactive Brokers Earnings Due After Charles Schwab's Easy Beat
summary: Charles Schwab earnings easily beat estimates for the second quarter early Tuesday as volatile markets drove record trading volume. Interactive Brokers earnings follow after the close. SCHW stock dropped near a buy point while IBKR stock popped.

headline: Why the CLARITY Act is so important for stablecoin customers & issuers
summary: Scott Melker speaks with RobinHood (HOOD) SVP of crypto Johann Kerbrat about the importance of the CLARITY Act and stablecoin legislation in the US. "The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.

headline: Uniswap Price Forecast: UNI Outpaces the Market and Could Keep Going If This Happens
summary: Uniswap (UNI) has outperformed the broader market with a 23% gain over the last month, driven largely by significant network activity following its integration with the new Robinhood Chain.

headline: Robinhood's $450M crypto bet: Inside Robinhood Chain's rapid rise
summary: Scott Melker welcomes Robinhood (HOOD) SVP of Crypto Johann Kerbrat to the show to discuss Robinhood Chain's early momentum after topping $450 million in total value locked (TVL) just three weeks after launch. The conversation also explores Robinhood Earn, the growing role of tokenized assets, and how 24/7 trading could transform financial markets. "The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.
